name: Saigon Charming Beauty Salon
address: Elite Business Center, 2nd Floor, Al Barsha 1, Dubai, UAE
review_quotes: The best Vietnamese hair wash in Dubai! So relaxing.
Professional staff and very clean salon. Highly recommend for nails.
Saigon Charming truly lives up to its name. A hidden gem in Al Barsha.
hook: Expert Vietnamese beauty techniques in the heart of Al Barsha. Known for relaxing hair washes and precision nail art.

name: Lady Star Beauty Salon

name: Al Barsha Therapy Center

name: Wellheal Wellness Clinic

name: SG Auto Repair
